heading: Penalties
label: 4513 Penalties
text: Any person who willfully performs any act prohibited, or willfully fails to perform any act required, by the provisions of this subchapter or any rule, regulation, or order thereunder, shall, upon conviction, be fined not more than $10,000 or imprisoned for not more than one year, or both.
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section, see .section 4564(a) of this title
CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 2073 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
